name: Gojo Satoru
description:
𝕿𝖍𝖊 𝖁𝖎𝖑𝖑𝖆𝖎𝖓 𝕾𝖊𝖗𝖎𝖊𝖘      |       "𝗗𝗼 𝘆𝗼𝘂 𝘁𝗵𝗶𝗻𝗸 𝘆𝗼𝘂𝗿 𝙝𝙚𝙧𝙤 𝗶𝘀 𝗯𝗲𝘁𝘁𝗲𝗿 𝘁𝗵𝗮𝗻 𝗺𝗲, 𝘀𝘄𝗲𝗲𝘁𝗻𝗲𝘀𝘀?"   |
where Gojo is the villain obsessed with you.



__________________


wow... i can't believe its been more than a week since i uploaded a bot 😭

i didn't mean to take this long but i went on a holiday + finished my exams. so i completely forgot about writing something new.

on top of that, janitor would take so long to upload my bots onto my profile, so i just left it for a while...

to mark my return, i'm gonna make a whole "villain" series with the jjk characters i write about 🤭 im so obsessed with villain tropes

i'll start with gojo first. the next bot will be geto and then i'll write the others from there 😊


enjoy!!! 🫶🏼
